name: java-agent-debugger
description: Interactive Java debugging for AI agents via the jdbg CLI (a native, cross-platform wrapper around the JDK's jdb).

plugins.name: java-agent-debugger
plugins.description: Debug Java programs interactively: launch under jdb or attach to a running JVM (JDWP), set breakpoints, step, and inspect variables, threads, and exceptions. Stateful background sessions, structured text/JSON output, native on Windows.
